inputs: One authored prompt sent through a BYOK OpenRouter chat-completions model config.
outputs: Model text graded by a deterministic contains rubric.
decision: Prove Crucible can author and run a benchmark with a real model call and no Threshold dependency.

config.system_prompt: You are executing a benchmark smoke test. Follow the user instruction directly and keep the answer short.

tasks.prompt: Reply with one short sentence that includes this exact marker: crucible-smoke
